overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a lush post-apocalyptic landscape. She circles a massive overgrown machine tower, passes NPCs gathered at riverside campfires, and traverses sunlit grasslands with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown machine tower by muddy river

events.description: character turns right to circle around the base of the tower structure
approaching the muddy water edge along the rocky shore

agents.ego_description: walking around the base of the overgrown tower, examining the structure and surroundings

entered.detail: massive vertical structure covered in greenery with wooden scaffolding platforms
mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible in the background
large red mechanical debris scattered across the landscape
brown murky water along the rocky shoreline
uneven rocky ground with scattered boulders and gravel

segments.scene_description: The character circles a massive overgrown machine tower in a wide-open landscape. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance while red mechanical wreckage dots the terrain. The camera follows as she turns right around the structure, approaching a muddy riverbank with rocky shores.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky campsite with NPCs around fires

events.description: moving from tower area into the NPC camp by the water's edge
turning left to walk past the seated NPCs around the campfire

agents.ego_description: moving through the camp area, passing by NPCs sitting around fires on the rocks

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sitting on rocks by a campfire, conversing

entered.detail: burning fire pit with smoke rising, surrounded by sitting figures
primitive tent structures made of wood and fabric
large decaying tree trunks used as seating around the camp

segments.scene_description: Leaving the tower behind, the scene opens into a rocky campsite where NPCs sit around burning fires. The character walks forward through the camp, passing seated figures on the right. Makeshift shelters appear on the left while the snow-capped mountains shift to the right side of the frame.

events.description: leaving rocky campsite and entering open grassland with tall vegetation
sunlight becomes more diffused as clouds pass overhead, creating softer shadows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and scattered trees in the open meadow

entered.detail: tall golden-green grass covering the ground in the open field
individual deciduous trees spread across the meadow
dense tree line forming the horizon boundary
shallow water pools reflecting the sky in the grassland

segments.scene_description: The character enters an expansive grassland dotted with scattered trees and small ponds. The rocky terrain gives way to soft golden grass underfoot. As she walks deeper into the meadow, the lighting shifts to a softer diffused quality while distant forests line the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the imposing scale of a mechanical ruin into a cozy riverside settlement and finally into a serene, open meadow. It begins by circling a massive overgrown machine tower amidst red wreckage and distant snow-capped mountains, moving right toward a muddy riverbank. As the tower recedes, the scene opens into a rocky campsite where the camera passes burning fires and seated NPCs, with makeshift shelters appearing on the left. The rocky terrain then gives way to expansive grasslands dotted with small ponds and scattered trees, while the mountains shift toward the edge of the frame. Finally, the lighting softens into a diffused glow as the character walks deeper into the golden meadow toward distant forests on the horizon.
